ab: Masamaan ko romi’ad anini^?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: Sienaw to ma:mang ko romi’ad, ka halinanom to faedetay.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.

ab: Masamaan ko romi’ad anini^?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: Faedet to ma:mang ko romi’ad, ka halinanomen!
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.

ab: Masamaan ko romi’ad i papotal?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: Tada tata’ak ko cidal, aka ka pawan a misipasip to sakicidal.
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.

ab: Masamaan ko romi’ad i papotal?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: Cicahid, caay ka sadak ko cidal.
en: There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.

ab: Masamaan ko romi’ad anocila^?
en: How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: Caay ka cidal anocila^, cicahid, nika tata’ak ko fali^.
ch: B:明天沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.

ab: Masamaan ko romi’ad itiya yo pihololan no mita?
ch: A:我們要去郊遊的那天天氣如何?
en: How was the weather that day?

ab: Sienaw to ma:mang koya romi’ad, ka cifodoy to kifetolay ano masadak.
ch: B:那天有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.

ab: Masamaan ko romi’ad toya pipahanhanan?
en: How’s the weather on the weekend?

ab: Fangcal ko romi’ad toya pipahanhanan.
en: It will be sunny on the weekend.

ab: Mama’orad ko romi’ad toya pihololan ita hay?
ch: A:我們要去郊遊的那天會下雨嗎?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: Fangcal ko romi’ad itiya, caay ka ’orad.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.

ab: Mama’orad ko romi’ad itiya pihololan ita hay?
ch: A:我們要去郊遊的那天會下雨嗎?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: Hay, o mama’orad koya romi’ad.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.

ab: Ma’oraday imatini hay?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: Masalaw to, masadak to ko cidal.
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.

ab: Ma’oraday imatini hay?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: Hay, ma’orad to, nika caay ka cicacelakan kako.
en: It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.

ab: Ma’orad i papotal haw?
en: Is it raining outside?

ab: Caay ka ’orad imatini, mama’orad i herek no lahok, saka kacicacelakan ano masadak.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.

ab: Sienaw ko romi’ad anoroma^ a mihecaan to kasienawan haw?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: Hay, sie:naw ko romi’ad anoroma^ a mihecaan, saka adihayen ka cifodoy.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: O caciferang ko romi’ad i aniniay a lalood haw?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: Hay, o caciferang ko romi’ad i lalood, saka kahalinanom.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.

ab: Maolah kiso to kacanglahan haw?
en: Do you like spring?

ab: Maolah kako to kacanglahan, caay ka faedet, caa:y ka sienaw.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.

ab: Maolah kiso to piporangan haw?
en: Do you like autumn?

ab: Caay ka olah kako to piporangan, nawhani adihay ko faliyos.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
